creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Alex,

if you want to ask about something, clarify something or discuss something, please start with forums, mailing lists and other support channels.  It's always advisable to do before opening a bug / problem report unless you are sure that you found a bug.

When opening a bug, please provide information about what you expected to get and what you got and why you think it is wrong.
Please try to avoid creating dozens one/two-line comments.

Also, if it is hard for you to communicate in English, please try to find local forums, BSD user groups, mailing lists where you can use your language (Ukrainian?).
